chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-827 of 2023 (Shaman alias Shamoo Junejo v. The State) Mr. Muhammad Qasim Kandhro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 04-03-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.: Applicant was arrested on 01.06.2023 in crime No.68 of 2023 registered at P.S, Baberloi, under section 396 PPC, and from him allegedly a pistol was recovered on 08.06.2023. Hence, the present FIR No.77 of 2023 was registered against him under section 24 of Sindh Arms Act, 2013. 2. Learned counsel for applicant in order to seek bail for the applicant submits that applicant has been granted bail in main case by this Court vide order dated 23.02.2024 in Crl. B.A.No.S- 829 of 2023. A copy of which, he has placed on record and has pleaded for bail. 3. Learned Deputy P.G for the State, in view of the fact that applicant has been granted bail in main case, has not opposed the bail. 4. Accordingly, this Crl. Bail Application is allowed on above ground and the applicant is admitted to post-arrest bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (One Lac) with P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial Court. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Ahmad
